description: Create and deploy a de-identification pipeline named 'PHI_Deidentification_Pipeline' for HL7 ADT messages. The pipeline must read HL7 v2.x files from '/home/ga/hl7_input/' and write cleaned messages to '/home/ga/hl7_output/'. For each message, replace PID-5 (Patient Name) with 'ANONYMOUS^PATIENT', PID-11 (Address) with 'REMOVED^^REMOVED^XX^00000', and remove values for PID-13 (Home Phone) and PID-19 (SSN). All other segments and fields must remain unchanged. Verify the channel by processing the sample files (Johnson, Martinez, Thompson) provided in the input directory.
